title: Chore: Add code quality gate
original_text: Added code quality gate with SonarQube. Configured quality rules and thresholds. Implemented quality gate in CI/CD. Added code smell detection. Implemented technical debt tracking. Result: code quality gate operational.
expected_subject: chore(quality): add code quality gate with SonarQube
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(quality): add code quality gate with SonarQube"
